title: Listening - Part 3
description: For each question, write the correct answer in the gap. Write one or two words or a number or a date or a time.
instructions: You will hear one person giving information. For questions 14–19, write the correct answer in the gap.
context: You will hear a woman giving information to volunteers at a river festival.
audio_script: Woman: Hello, volunteers, and thanks for giving your time to help at this year’s river festival. It’s our biggest event of the summer, and we couldn’t run it without you. The festival opens to visitors at eleven, but volunteers should meet at [14]8:45[/14] so we can give everyone a badge and explain their jobs. Please come to the white tent near the bridge first, not to the stage area. Most volunteers will help with stalls, but we also need four people to work at the [15]information desk[/15], where visitors will ask about times, toilets and lost property. If you’re doing that job, please stay calm and write down any difficult questions for the organisers. The children’s activities will be in the park, and this year the most popular one will probably be [16]painting[/16], so we have ordered extra paper and brushes. At lunchtime, volunteers can collect food from the [17]green van[/17] behind the stage. You’ll get a sandwich, fruit and a drink. Please don’t take food from the café stalls because those are for paying visitors. In the afternoon, there will be a boat race. We need people to stand by the river and keep children behind the [18]rope[/18]. It’s not dangerous, but the path gets crowded. At the end of the day, please return your badge before you leave. Everyone who helps for the full day will receive [19]two[/19] free tickets for next year’s festival. If you have any questions now, please come and speak to me after this meeting. Remember to bring a warm jacket as well, because the river area can feel cold later in the afternoon, even in summer.

questions.explanation: Some volunteers will work at the information desk.
The speaker says painting will probably be the most popular children's activity.
Volunteers can collect food from the green van.
People must keep children behind the rope.
Volunteers who help all day will receive two free tickets.
